name: Cropolution
short_description: In Cropolution, you’re not just a farmer—you’re a pioneer in the future of agriculture! Join forces with a team of scientists as you experiment and evolve entirely new species of crops, bugs, and fish. Will you rise to the challenge and revolutionize the world’s ecosystems?
detailed_description:
Reviews

“It is one of those games that you start playing and then you notice simply can't put it down. Charming and simple in a good way, give it a try!”

— Steam user review

“Cropolution is a charming and affordable 2D farming and evolution game with an addictive yet relaxing gameplay loop.”

— Steam user review

Your mission...

Your mission is to carefully manage limited resources while pushing the boundaries of nature itself.

Grow and evolve new and exciting crops, engineer exotic bug species, and breed aquatic creatures to thrive in this ever-changing world.

Success requires strategy, creativity, and precision as you unlock every evolution and shape the future of farming.

Will you rise to the challenge and revolutionize the world’s ecosystems?

Features

Farming

Start with a single seed and cultivate your farm into a thriving haven of evolving plant species! As you grow and nurture unique crops, beware—a swarm of pesky bugs invades once a day, threatening your hard-earned harvest. Can you protect your evolving plants and turn your farm into a botanical paradise?

Fishing

Cast your line into the enchanting waters to discover an array of adorable, whimsical fish! Every catch brings excitement, as you can evolve and combine your fish into entirely new species! Get ready to reel in the fun and build a one-of-a-kind aquatic collection!

Bug Catching

Explore the vibrant island and capture all sorts of charming, quirky bugs as they flutter and scuttle through the environment! Every bug you catch can evolve into fascinating new species with special traits, giving you the chance to create your very own collection of extraordinary, never-before-seen creatures. It's a wild, adventurous journey into the world of insect evolution!

Museum

Showcase your discoveries by donating evolved plants, fish, and bugs to the island's museum to unlock new items, allowing you to expand your farm. Complete the museum’s collection and become a legendary curator of the island's evolving wildlife and flora!
